results.justification: Output is valid JSON with no markdown fences. business_rules array has 7 entries (≥5), each with id and rule fields. acceptance_criteria array has 7 entries (≥5), each with given/when/then fields. edge_cases array has 5 entries (≥2). confidence object has numeric level (95). Rules include null handling (BR-6) and zero-total behavior (BR-4). Acceptance criteria cover mixed counts (AC-1), all-fail (AC-2), all-zero/null (AC-3), all-pass (AC-4), and null counts (AC-5).

observations.text: All required top-level sections present: domain_analysis, business_rules, acceptance_criteria, edge_cases, confidence
Business rules are domain-specific to passbar rendering, not generic platitudes
Includes invariant flags and justifications beyond what was required
Edge cases are genuinely non-obvious (negative counts, large disparity, equal splits)
Null handling explicitly covered in BR-6 and AC-3/AC-5
Zero-total behavior explicitly covered in BR-4 and AC-3

results.agent_output_excerpt: {"domain_analysis":{"business_context":"The eval dashboard displays evaluation run results for the DreamTeam agent system. The passbar is a visual summary indicator on each run row that communicates at a glance how an eval run performed — the proportional breakdown of pass, partial, and fail outcomes. This is a data visualization correctness concern: the bar must faithfully represent the underlying data.","bounded_context":"Eval Dashboard — reporting and visualization of agent evaluation results

meta.notes: Preliminary scoring by Coach K. Human review pending via web app at localhost:3000.
